title: vicia sativa f. alba
intro: Vicia sativa f. alba, also known as white vetch or white spring vetch, is a subspecies of the Vicia sativa plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Vicia sativa f. alba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
